priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: force-kill required to recover, 100% reproducible on Android v2.4.1, blocks primary AI-to-purchase conversion flow, 2 of top-2 similar bugs are P0
severity_justification: The bug requires a force-kill to recover, making it a hard crash equivalent — 100% reproducible on Android v2.4.1 across all devices. It blocks the primary conversion flow (AI recommendation → add to cart → purchase), which is the core revenue-generating path for SLAP. Two highly similar historical bugs (FLIPPI-2180 at 0.58 similarity and FLIPPI-1597 at 0.50) were both classified P0, reinforcing this assessment.
owner_reason: Shailja Rani is the assignee on the three most closely related checkout/cart-flow bugs in FLIPPI (FLIPPI-1665 Buy Now unclickable, FLIPPI-1663 Checkout price discrepancy, FLIPPI-1654 Coupons missing in checkout), indicating she owns the cart-integration layer from the SLAP chat surface.
